# Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Illinois
Region: US-IL
Citation: Biometric Information Privacy Act
Authority: Illinois General Assembly
Source URL: https://www.ilga.gov/legislation/ilcs/ilcs3.asp?ActID=3004&ChapterID=57
Topics: sensitive_data, consent, notice_transparency, retention_deletion, third_party_sharing
Keywords: BIPA, Illinois biometric privacy, biometric identifier, written release

## Summary
Illinois biometric privacy law requiring notice, written release, retention schedules, and restrictions on biometric identifiers and information.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide written notice and obtain written release before collection.
- Publish retention and destruction policy.
- Restrict sale, disclosure, and safeguarding of biometric data.
